pages.text: Let $(item)Anvil$() fall on the mob's feet, on the spawner or on the redstone block causes the change. The following pages of this entry are introduced in sequence.$(br)-$(l:basic/more_processing#loot)Get more mob loot$()$(br)-$(l:basic/more_processing#spawner)Spawner: Forced Spawn$()$(br)-$(l:basic/more_processing#EMP)Redstone Block: Redstone EMP$()$(br)-$(l:basic/more_processing#trader)游商转化$()$(br)-$(l:basic/more_processing#villager)村民重置$()$(br)-$(l:basic/more_processing#vault)宝库重置$()

Get more mob loot:$(br)When mobs are hit and damaged by an anvil, they will drop items according to the mob loot table. The mobs must be taken enough damage at once: 40% HP→1x drops; 60% HP→2x drops; 80% HP→3x drops.$(br)Using the $(item)Embers Anvil$() can produce drops such as flame sticks that require manual killing by players.$(br)There are mobs that can regenerate health on their own or with the help of external forces, which you can use to create drop farms that don't kill mobs.

pages.name: Spawner: Forced Spawn
pages.text: Spawners that are hit will attempt to spawn. Detailed instructions on the right.

The higher the drop height of the anvil, the greater the chance of spawning. This method of farming does not require players to be around, but it needs to meet the lighting conditions of the spawner and the number of mobs around it will also affect the spawning, and quickly transporting or killing nearby mobs can greatly improve efficiency.

pages.name: Redstone Block: Redstone EMP
pages.text: A hit Redstone Block will produce redstone EMP. Detailed instructions on the right.

When an anvil hits a redstone block, the redstone block torches within a distance of r on the same layer as the redstone block will be extinguished by 1gt. An iron trapdoor clinging to redstone block can prevent EMP from spreading in this direction.$(br)R is calculated: the distance is proportional to the drop height, the drop height of 1 block spreads 6 blocks, and the limit distance is 24 blocks.

pages.title: 转化流浪商人
pages.text: 流浪商人被铁砧砸击后(不可砸死)会被转化成村民。$(br)有$(thing)15%$()的概率变为傻子。$(br)另有$(thing)10%$()的概率保留之前的交易(职业变为大师-农民)

pages.title: 重置村民
pages.text: 村民被铁砧砸击后(不可砸死)会被重置。$(br)但是有$(thing)20%$()的概率变为傻子。

pages.name: 重置宝库
pages.text: 使用$(item)铅块$()让宝库忘记自己曾被打开$(br)可配合$(l:smithing/jewelcrafting_table)钥匙再生$()项目
